case_title: LIUYAN RUAN VS. YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY RUAN, LIUYAN AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. FRYE CLAIMS CONSULTATION AND ADMINISTRATION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
